overview: Baby Turtle is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 0 physical damage, 10 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Sight range 10.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 10 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 10 units, loses target at 10 units, 180° vision angle.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 10 units. Loses target at 10 units.
